description: Add npm keywords to all plugins from supabase through zillow to improve discoverability on npm search. Extends existing keywords array with MCP and AI agent related terms.
qualityChecks: echo 'Verifying package.json changes...' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const plugins=['supabase','target','teams','telegram','terraform-cloud','tiktok','tinder','todoist','tripadvisor','tumblr','twilio','twitch','uber','vercel','walmart','webflow','whatsapp','wikipedia','x','yelp','ynab','youtube','youtube-music','zendesk','zillow'];let ok=true;for(const p of plugins){const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('plugins/'+p+'/package.json','utf8'));if(!pkg.keywords||pkg.keywords.length<2){console.error(p+': missing keywords');ok=false;}if(!pkg.keywords.includes('mcp')){console.error(p+': missing mcp keyword');ok=false;}}if(!ok)process.exit(1);console.log('All plugins in batch 4 have correct keywords');"

userStories.title: Add npm keywords to plugins supabase through zillow
userStories.description: Add MCP and AI agent related keywords to the keywords array in all 25 plugin package.json files from supabase through zillow (alphabetical). Each plugin currently has keywords: ["opentabs-plugin"]. Add additional keywords for npm discoverability.
acceptanceCriteria: Every plugin package.json in the batch has keywords array containing at minimum: opentabs-plugin, opentabs, mcp, modelcontextprotocol, chrome-extension, ai-agent, browser-automation
The existing opentabs-plugin keyword is preserved (first position)
No other fields in any package.json are modified

All 25 plugins are updated: supabase, target, teams, telegram, terraform-cloud, tiktok, tinder, todoist, tripadvisor, tumblr, twilio, twitch, uber, vercel, walmart, webflow, whatsapp, wikipedia, x, yelp, ynab, youtube, youtube-music, zendesk, zillow
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/supabase/package.json
- plugins/target/package.json
- plugins/teams/package.json
- plugins/telegram/package.json
- plugins/terraform-cloud/package.json
- plugins/tiktok/package.json
- plugins/tinder/package.json
- plugins/todoist/package.json
- plugins/tripadvisor/package.json
- plugins/tumblr/package.json
- plugins/twilio/package.json
- plugins/twitch/package.json
- plugins/uber/package.json
- plugins/vercel/package.json
- plugins/walmart/package.json
- plugins/webflow/package.json
- plugins/whatsapp/package.json
- plugins/wikipedia/package.json
- plugins/x/package.json
- plugins/yelp/package.json
- plugins/ynab/package.json
- plugins/youtube/package.json
- plugins/youtube-music/package.json
- plugins/zendesk/package.json
- plugins/zillow/package.json

Context:
All plugins currently have `"keywords": ["opentabs-plugin"]`. We need to add discoverability keywords so these show up when people search npm for MCP-related packages. The `opentabs-plugin` keyword must remain (it's used for npm auto-discovery by the MCP server).

Changes:
For each plugin, change the keywords array from:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin"
]
```
To:
```json
"keywords": [
    "opentabs-plugin",
    "opentabs",
    "mcp",
    "modelcontextprotocol",
    "chrome-extension",
    "ai-agent",
    "browser-automation"
]
```

The pattern is identical for every plugin in this batch. Use a script or manual editing — the change is the same for all 25 files.

Constraints:
- Do NOT modify any field other than keywords
- Do NOT change the description, opentabs field, or any other package.json content
- Keep `opentabs-plugin` as the first keyword (it's used for npm auto-discovery)
- Keep JSON formatting consistent: 2-space indent, keywords array with each entry on its own line (matching existing style)
- Do NOT touch plugins/e2e-test (not in this batch anyway)
